name: CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS, INC. /MO/
business: Charter Communications is a leading broadband connectivity company that provides Internet, mobile, video, and voice services to residential and commercial customers across 41 states through its Spectrum brand.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading broadband connectivity company with services available to 58 million homes and small to large businesses across 41 states through our Spectrum brand.
The service enables parental control schedules and Spectrum Security Shield which is automatically enabled and protects all devices in the home using network-based security.
We provide our customers with a choice of video programming services on a variety of platforms and through a variety of programming packages with approximately 375 channels.
We currently incorporate AI technology in certain parts of our business operations.

catalysts.sentence: In early 2026, we will launch our Invincible WiFi product, a tri-band advanced WiFi 7 router that integrates 5G cellular and battery backup to keep customers seamlessly and fully connected during service disruption or a power outage.

catalysts.event: Launch of Spectrum Business mobile service using T-Mobile network
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we entered into a multi-year agreement with T-Mobile US, Inc. ( T-Mobile ) to use their network to deliver mobile services to Spectrum Business customers which is set to launch in 2026.

catalysts.event: Completion of network evolution to offer faster speeds
catalysts.sentence: Through this process, which we expect to be largely complete by the end of 2027, we will transform our network to offer much faster Internet speeds.
